$comment: add_unit: generate ONE unit of a composed C++ program into the active workspace. Reads its spec (from <ws>/specs/<specfile>) + the existing unit headers (project_api) so it uses prior units' real names/signatures, generates the C++ file (a header-only component or the main.cpp entry), stages it + refreshes the aggregator + builds the WHOLE project (stage_unit, the oracle), repairs up to twice, registers it. Called by the compose foreach: $input = '<targetpath> <specfile>'. proj = $workspace.
summary: Generate one composed C++ unit against the accumulated project, build the whole project with cl, repair twice, register.
